first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning, strengths, and concerns are thematically the same in both evaluations. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new concerns related to the change in the candidate's location from Berlin to Lagos. The core assessment of strong experience but less-defined strategic AI leadership remains consistent.
